creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #0)

Please follow bug #203014.

It considers your patch for security/tor-devel, adds an option to use/install a pluggable transport proxy, updates typos and corrects the behavior of a previous patch (tested with 11.0-CURRENT, 10.2-STABLE and 9.3-RELEASE.).

Based on base r238405, OSVERSION to check OpenSSL should be 1000015.
